caption: Discover how 72-hour fasts can reboot your body 🔄. During this time, your stem cells undergo autophagy, a natural process that recycles damaged cells 🌟. This leads to increased production of new stem cells, improving overall health 🌱. Save this post for later, share with someone who's interested in fasting, and follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health tips 📚. Don't miss the next one! 💡 #stemcellregeneration #fastingforhealth #autophagy #cellregeneration #healthyliving #wellness #medicalbreakthroughs #regenerativemedicine
